ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "cust_gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the customer (0: Male, 1: Female) */,
  "cust_age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "cust_income" REAL /* Income of the customer */,
  "cust_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "cust_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "cust_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "cust_loyalty_tier" TEXT /* Loyalty tier of the customer */,
  "cust_registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "store_opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the store opened */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  "store_area" REAL /* Area of the store in square feet */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_store_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who has the preference */,
  "pref_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., taste, price) */,
  "pref_value" INTEGER /* Value of the preference (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "pref_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was last updated */,
  "pref_source" TEXT /* Source of the preference data (e.g., survey, app, in-store feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preferences_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "trans_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "trans_time" TEXT /* Time of the transaction */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total amount spent in the transaction */,
  "trans_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "trans_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "trans_staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who processed the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., food, drink) */,
  "product_calories" INTEGER /* Calories in the product */,
  "product_price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients in the product */,
  "product_allergens" TEXT /* List of allergens in the product */,
  "product_available_from" TEXT /* Date when the product became available */,
  "product_available_until" TEXT /* Date when the product will no longer be available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that the sale belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that was sold */,
  "sale_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "sale_tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "sale_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drink size */,
  "sale_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drink type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sale_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_size_id") REFERENCES drink_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sale_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_type_id") REFERENCES drink_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "comp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that the competitor data belongs to */,
  "comp_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "comp_distance" REAL /* Distance to the competitor */,
  "comp_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the competitor */,
  "comp_menu_url" TEXT /* URL of the competitor's menu */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitors_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drink_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drink size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the drink size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "size_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the drink size in ounces */,
  "size_price" REAL /* Price of the drink size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drink_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drink type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the drink type (e.g., Drip Coffee, Latte) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the drink type */,
  "type_ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients in the drink type */,
  "type_allergens" TEXT /* List of allergens in the drink type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
